citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:48 pm on April
22, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee via phone, leaving a voicemail, waiting 40minutes, reattempting
a second call and leaving a second voicemail. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection
is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement
action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:48 pm on April 
22, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee via phone, leaving a voicemail, waiting 40minutes, reattempting 
a second call and leaving a second voicemail. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection 
is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement 
action. 
 
 
End Section
